message:
test(engine): enrich inline unit tests and add TS ingestion pipeline with formatting normalization

Add ~2,000 lines of enrichment tests across dual_backend_parser,
galaxy_brain_explainability, monitor_scheduler, sibling_integration_benchmark_gate,
and test_logging_schema covering serde roundtrips, invariant assertions, edge cases,
and error variant completeness. Add full TS-to-pipeline ingestion function with
capability contract validation in ts_normalization. Apply rustfmt normalization
(struct literal expansion, assert macro formatting) across 25 source files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
